queries.name: orderService.listOrders (staff, no filter)
queries.sql: SELECT o.* FROM orders o ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 20

queries.name: orderService.listOrders (client filter)
queries.sql: SELECT o.* FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = ? ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

queries.name: orderService.getById
queries.sql: SELECT o.* FROM orders o WHERE o.id = ?

queries.name: dashboardService.getSuperadminMetrics - total orders count
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders

queries.name: dashboardService.getSuperadminMetrics - unpaid orders
queries.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount - amount_paid), 0) AS total_outstanding FROM orders WHERE payment_status != 'paid'

queries.name: dashboardService.getRevenueReport
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM payments WHERE status = 'success' AND created_at >= ? AND created_at < ?

queries.name: userService.listUsers (clients paginated)
queries.description: Paginated client list with customer join
queries.sql: SELECT u.* FROM users u INNER JOIN customers c ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE u.role = 'client' ORDER BY u.id ASC LIMIT 20 OFFSET 0

queries.name: userService.listUsers with search
queries.description: LIKE search on username, email, names
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE role = 'client' AND (username LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%test%' OR first_name LIKE '%test%' OR last_name LIKE '%test%') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 20 OFFSET 0

queries.name: orderService.updateCustomerStats
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS total_orders, SUM(total_amount) AS total_spent, MAX(created_at) AS last_order_date FROM orders WHERE customer_id = ?

queries.name: dashboardService employee metrics - assigned count
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE assigned_to = ?

queries.name: dashboardService client metrics - customer orders
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE customer_id = ?

queries.name: dashboardService today orders range filter
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE created_at >= CURDATE() AND created_at < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

queries.name: serviceCatalogService.list
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM services WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY name ASC

queries.name: orders filter by status
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at DESC
